login_disclaimer_line1: Authentication is handled by EVE Online.
login_disclaimer_line2: No password is stored by this service.

EVE Online, the EVE logo, EVE and all associated logos and designs are the intellectual property of CCP hf. All artwork, screenshots, characters, vehicles, storylines, world facts or other recognizable features of the intellectual property relating to these trademarks are likewise the intellectual property of CCP hf. CCP hf. has granted permission to E-R Bridge to use EVE Online and all associated logos and designs for promotional and information purposes on its website but does not endorse, and is not in any way affiliated with, E-R Bridge. CCP is in no way responsible for the content on or functioning of this website, nor can it be liable for any damage arising from the use of this website.
characters_remove_body: This character will be removed from your account. You can add them again at any time via add character and performing an EVE login.
account_delete_account_body: Your account will be deactivated. To restore it, log back in within 30 days; after that, your data is permanently removed.
account_keys_intro: API keys let scripts and integrations talk to E-R Bridge on your behalf. Treat them like passwords.
account_keys_revoke_body: Anything using this key will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.
account_keys_reveal_warning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now — we can't show it again.
account_keys_reveal_copy_failed: Couldn't copy automatically — select the key and copy it manually.
account_keys_reveal_ack: I've saved this key somewhere safe.
prefs_intro: Changes preview as you make them. Click Apply to save them — when you're signed in they're stored on your account and follow you across devices.
prefs_locale_description: The language the interface is displayed in.
prefs_text_size_description: Scales all text in the interface. Auto follows your browser's default size.
prefs_reduce_motion_description: Disables animations and transitions. Auto follows your system setting.
prefs_high_contrast_description: Increases contrast between text and background. Auto follows your system setting.
prefs_large_targets_description: Increases the minimum size of buttons and links to make them easier to hit.
prefs_dyslexia_font_description: Replaces the interface font with Atkinson Hyperlegible.
admin_admins_revoke_body: This account will lose server-admin powers. You can grant it again at any time.
admin_admins_add_intro: Search for a character; the account that owns it will be promoted.
admin_admins_promote_body: The account that owns this character will be granted server-admin powers.
admin_blocks_unblock_body: This character will be removed from the block list. The owning account's tokens are not restored — each character must be re-authorised via EVE login.
admin_blocks_add_intro: Block by EVE character ID. The owning account, if any, is signed out immediately.
admin_blocks_id_required: A valid EVE character ID is required.
blocked_body: Your account has been blocked from E-R Bridge. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact a server administrator.
